zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de TANCARVILLE於1180年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 哈福時，她的父親Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie31歲，母親Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville25歲。她於1205年與Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours在法國瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1215年在法國瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de TANCARVILLE于1180年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 哈福时，她的父亲Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie31岁，母亲Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville25岁。她于1205年与Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours在法国瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1215年在法国瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de TANCARVILLE was born in 1180, in Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie, was 31 and her mother, Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville, was 25. She married Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours in 1205, in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1215, in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de TANCARVILLE est née en 1180, à Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours en 1205, à Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1215, à Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de TANCARVILLE 1180 in Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie 31 und ihre Mutter Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville 25. Sie hat 1205 in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1215 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de TANCARVILLE è nata il nel 1180 nel Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours nel 1205, nel Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1215, nel Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de TANCARVILLEが1180年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメル ハvアで生まれた時，父Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandieは31歳，母Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaevilleは25歳であった。1205年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンフォンティアイネブレアウでAdam I De Villebeon De Nemoursと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1215年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンフォンティアイネブレアウで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de TANCARVILLE(이)가 1180년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 일 하브르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1205년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰테인블리에서 Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1215년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰테인블리에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de TANCARVILLE nasceu em 1180, em Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours em 1205, em Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1215, em Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, França, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de TANCARVILLE родилась в 1180 г. в местности л хавр, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours в 1205 г. в местности фонтеинебло, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1215 г. в местности фонтеинебло, сине-ет-марн, Франция в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de TANCARVILLE nació en 1180, en Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours en 1205, en Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1215, en Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, a la edad de 35 años.
